'''Grozbok''' was a reprogrammed [[GRZ-6B wrecker droid]] and worked under the command of [[Olag Greck]]. Wreaking havoc on [[Hosk Station/Legends|Hosk Station]], it was destroyed by [[Zed|Unit Zed's]] [[Security droid/Legends|security droids]].

{{Droid-stub}}

*[[Droids (1994) 6|''Droids'' (1994) 6]] {{1st}}
